page_content:
Program Learning Outcomes

1. Design, execute, document, and disseminate research that applies tools and methods from data science to address a social science research question

2. Develop expertise in speciﬁc contemporary social science theories and data science approaches to tackling research questions related to these theories

3. Apply ﬁndings from social data science research to analyze the policy and design of socio-technical systems

4. Identify and analyze social, legal, and ethical and equity issues in social data science work and in the profession
